title: BlockPixel Christmas Addon
description: This is a simple Christmas-themed prerequisite texture pack that I’m continuously updating. It doesn’t affect normal gameplay and is suitable for survival adventures. Make sure to place it before BlockPixel.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1df2562d2c731085fe197a7f016f48d6857c00b6.jpeg)

This is a simple Christmas-themed prerequisite texture pack that I’m continuously updating. It doesn’t affect normal gameplay and is suitable for survival adventures. Make sure to place it before [BockPixel](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blockpixel) texture pack.
